---
title: "Gallery"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| results: asis

gallery_root <- "images/gallery"

year_dirs <- list.dirs(gallery_root, recursive = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
year_dirs <- sort(year_dirs, decreasing = TRUE)

make_caption <- function(x) {
  x <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(x))
  x <- sub("^[0-9]+[_-]?", "", x)
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("-", " ", x)
  tools::toTitleCase(x)
}

for (year in year_dirs) {
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", year))
  cat('<div class="year-gallery">\n')

  imgs <- list.files(
    file.path(gallery_root, year),
    pattern = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|JPG|JPEG|PNG|WEBP)$",
    full.names = FALSE
  )

  imgs <- sort(imgs)

  for (img in imgs) {
    img_path <- file.path(gallery_root, year, img)
    caption <- make_caption(img)

    cat(sprintf(
'<div class="gallery-card"><img src="%s" alt="%s" class="gallery-thumb" data-full="%s" data-caption="%s"><p>%s</p></div>\n',
img_path, caption, img_path, caption, caption
    ))
  }

  cat('</div>\n')
}
```
